title: Transfer Ownership in Vietnam
metaDescription: WTP Advisory provides expert transfer-of-ownership services, ensuring a smooth and legally compliant business ownership transition through official registration with relevant government authorities.

hero.title: Transfer Ownership in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: WTP Advisory provides expert transfer ownership services, ensuring a smooth and legally compliant business ownership transition through official registration with relevant government authorities.

sections.heading: What are the benefits of transferring a business ownership in Vietnam?
body: Transferring business ownership in Vietnam offers several key advantages, including a quick process with fewer bureaucratic hurdles, reduced paperwork compared to starting a new company, and no requirement to prove financial capability.
Additionally, foreign investors can gain long-term residency through investor visas or temporary residence cards, enabling stable business operations and personal settlement in Vietnam.
